actionUnits.condition: Validate initial serialized state for MonoBehaviour_0 (m_Script guid=1729fd01c90a64d5b8037e1eef0d000d matches Fire.cs). Fields: isOn=false, shouldTurnOn=false, timeToOnMin=40, timeToOnMax=60 (Awake randomizes timeToOn within [40,60]), onNeighbors=0, neighbors=[], maxNeighborDistance=4, onNeighborsThreshold=2, minNeighborDownDistance=3; BoxCollider enabled; no Rigidbody. Expect: No state changes in Update because shouldTurnOn=false and isTurningOff=false. ParticleSystem on mainEffectGo (fileID=1849464941111748095) must remain stopped. There are no m_Calls UnityEvents on this component.

Neighbor ignition propagation path. Precondition: At least two neighboring Fire instances within maxNeighborDistance=4m must notify this object they are ON via Fire.NotifyNeighborState(true) so that onNeighbors reaches onNeighborsThreshold=2 and CheckNeighborState() sets shouldTurnOn=true and timeToOnDelta=0. For down-accelerated timing, ensure at least one neighbor is lower by > minNeighborDownDistance=3m to set hasDownNeighbor=true and apply downMultiplier=2. Awake randomized timeToOn in [40,60], so we wait up to 65s to exceed worst case. Expect during Update: timeToOnDelta accumulates until >= timeToOn, then isOn=true, shouldTurnOn=false, timeToOnDelta=0, isTurningOff=false, currentHitTime=0, UpdateFireState(true) runs: mainEffectGo ParticleSystem.Play(), neighbors notified via NotifyAllNeighbors(), and FireController.Instance.FireChanged(+1).

Water extinguish path while fire is ON. Precondition: Fire is currently isOn=true (from prior step). During this 6s window, an external water system must call IWaterInteractable.WaterHit(Vector3 normal) on this object repeatedly with hits spaced less than maxHitInterval=2s (e.g., every 1.0s). Each call sets isTurningOff=true and resets currentHitInterval=0. Expect: currentHitTime accumulates and once >= totalHitTime=5s within a sequence of intervals <2s, Update turns off the fire: isOn=false, shouldTurnOn=false, timeToOnDelta=0, isTurningOff=false, currentHitTime=0, UpdateFireState(true) runs: mainEffectGo ParticleSystem.Stop(), neighbors notified via NotifyAllNeighbors(), and FireController.Instance.FireChanged(-1).

Extinguish cancellation branch. Precondition: Fire is isOn=true again (e.g., re-lit by neighbor propagation as in step 2 or externally via SetIsOn(true)). At t=0, a single call to WaterHit(Vector3) is performed. Then wait without additional hits for > maxHitInterval=2s (e.g., 2.5s). Expect: currentHitInterval exceeds maxHitInterval, so in Update the branch triggers: isTurningOff=false and currentHitTime=0 (extinguishing attempt is canceled and does not turn off the fire).

Neighbor reduction branch in CheckNeighborState. Precondition: While the fire is currently off and shouldTurnOn might be true (e.g., after neighbors previously turned on), have one or both neighbors call NotifyNeighborState(false) so that onNeighbors drops below onNeighborsThreshold=2. Expect: CheckNeighborState() else-branch executes, forcing shouldTurnOn=false and timeToOnDelta=0 so the fire will not auto-ignite.
